faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our professional packages

pricing.question: How does the pricing work?
pricing.answer: Our packages are priced monthly in Egyptian Pounds (EGP). You can upgrade or downgrade your package at any time.

features.question: What features are included?
features.answer: Each package includes different features like project showcases, gallery management, lead generation, and analytics. Check our comparison table for details.

support.question: What kind of support do you provide?
support.answer: We provide email support for all packages, with priority support and dedicated account managers for higher tiers.

cancellation.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
cancellation.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your access will continue until the end of your billing period.
